sites.description: Keep a stick balanced as long as you can

sites.name: Country Marble Race
sites.description: Watch marbles race down a track in a tournament

sites.description: Play classic meme sound effects and download them

sites.description: Wait and watch the egg hatch!

sites.description: TV static that slowly resolves into a hidden message. Wait for it.

sites.name: How Long Have You Been Staring?

sites.name: Grow Your Garden
sites.description: Click to plant seeds that grow in real time. Come back tomorrow and they're taller.

sites.description: Watch a bouncing ball create psychedelic trails

sites.description: Generate Shakespearean-style insults

sites.description: Your phone has a crack in it

sites.name: The Last Time

sites.name: Wreck Room

sites.name: Breathe
sites.description: Guided breathing meditation with calming animations

sites.name: Daily Affirmations
sites.description: Start your day with peaceful, positive affirmations

sites.name: Slow TV

sites.description: Watch chess pieces create beautiful colored patterns on an infinite board

sites.name: Gravity Search
sites.description: A perfectly normal search engine. Until you search.

sites.name: Voice Paint

sites.name: 1,000 Balls
sites.description: Exactly one thousand bouncing balls. Count them if you don't believe us.

sites.name: Binary Sudoku

sites.name: Room 404
sites.description: This room does not exist.

sites.name: Ink Drop
sites.description: Click to drop ink into water and watch it bloom, curl, and mix

sites.name: Rothko Machine
sites.description: An endless stream of generated color field paintings, each with a deadpan title

sites.name: Murmuration
sites.description: A few thousand starlings at dusk. Your cursor is the hawk.

sites.description: Paint with radial symmetry — every stroke blooms into a mandala

sites.name: Tessellation
sites.description: Draw anywhere and your strokes tile into an endless repeating pattern

sites.name: Camouflage
sites.description: A white page with white text. It's in there somewhere.

sites.name: Wet Paint
sites.description: The sign says do not touch. Everything you touch smears.

sites.name: The Quietest Site on the Web
sites.description: 0.000 dB and holding. Please do not adjust your volume.

sites.name: Weaver

sites.name: Fireflies
sites.description: A meadow of fireflies slowly finds one shared rhythm. Click to scatter it.

sites.name: Coastline
sites.description: How long is the coast? Depends how hard you look.

sites.name: Chaos Game
sites.description: Place three dots and watch pure randomness draw a perfect fractal

sites.name: The Infinite Painting
sites.description: Zoom into the brushstrokes. There is no bottom.

sites.description: Zoom out. The maze keeps going. Zoom out more.

sites.name: The Dummy Factory
sites.description: A bear-headed helicopter in clown shoes. Or reroll for one of 29,000 others.

sites.name: Oddly Specific Horoscopes
sites.description: The stars have reviewed your file. Today's reading is uncomfortably precise.
